# Settlement Endpoint Control Tower

Synthetic reference demo for pre-validating identity-bound settlement endpoints before tokenized or fiat value moves.

## Product model

The control tower combines institution identity, legal-entity authority, wallet and custody context, policy checks, fiat fallback instructions, and ISO 20022/UETR-style evidence into one governed endpoint profile.

## Demo boundary

- Synthetic fixtures only.
- No real payments.
- No live identity or authority verification.
- No live wallet-ownership checks.
- No live sanctions or chain analytics.
- No proprietary reference-data rows.
- No production compliance claim.

## Main artifact

- `/` — self-contained browser demo with no external network calls.
